overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a multi-level cyberpunk city at night. The character traverses from a rooftop shanty camp down through elevated scaffolding walkways to a neon-lit street market, passing futuristic vehicles and holographic advertisements in a dense urban canyon.

events.description: character approaches and begins descending metal stairs

agents.ego_description: walking across the concrete rooftop past homeless encampments toward the stairway

notable_agents.action: homeless person in red pants sitting on the ground near belongings
homeless person sitting by a fire barrel under makeshift shelter

entered.detail: cracked concrete surface with white painted markings and scattered debris
makeshift shelter with tarps, cardboard, and a burning barrel
massive concrete overpass creating partial cover overhead
towering futuristic skyscrapers with bright neon advertisements and holographic displays
rusted metal staircase with railings leading down to lower levels

segments.scene_description: The character begins on a concrete rooftop beneath a massive overpass in a cyberpunk city at night. Homeless encampments with tarps and fire barrels occupy the sides of the roof while neon-lit skyscrapers tower in the background. The character walks forward toward a metal stairway, passing sitting NPCs, and begins the descent into the urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated scaffolding walkway between high-rise buildings

events.description: moves from concrete rooftop onto metal scaffolding walkway
character turns to survey the cityscape view while continuing along the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking down metal stairs and along elevated scaffolding walkways, surveying the neon city below

entered.detail: rusted metal grating walkway with orange safety railings
large floating holographic advertisement with cyan and pink neon colors
deep vertical view down to illuminated streets multiple levels below

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the rooftop onto rusted metal scaffolding walkways suspended between buildings. The narrow walkway provides a vertiginous view down into the illuminated city canyon below, surrounded by towering holographic billboards and neon signage. The character descends while the camera pans to capture the sprawling cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: mid-level urban walkway overlooking street market

events.description: moving into area with brighter neon exposure from multiple holographic signs
approaching street level with visible market stalls and pedestrian activity below

agents.ego_description: traversing elevated walkways while looking down at street level market activity and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking near market stalls at street level

entered.detail: illuminated vendor area with multiple stalls visible below
large white market umbrellas covering street vendor stalls
futuristic vehicles parked along the street below
tall pole with bright white floodlight illuminating the area

segments.scene_description: The character continues along elevated walkways, now overlooking a street market below with white vendor umbrellas and parked cars. The environment features dense neon signage including an 'Amber Light' sign and various holographic advertisements. The camera pans to reveal the depth of the urban canyon as the character approaches street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: street market under overpass with luxury vehicles

events.description: character walks past a sleek black sports car parked on the street

agents.ego_description: walking through the street market area, passing by vendor stalls and a sleek black sports car with illuminated accents

notable_agents.action: sleek black sports car with orange accent lighting and illuminated wheels parked on the street

entered.detail: cracked asphalt road surface with dark patches and debris
futuristic black sports car with glowing orange trim and illuminated wheel rims
street vendor stalls with white umbrellas and scattered merchandise

segments.scene_description: The character reaches street level and walks through an open market area beneath the overpass. The scene features vendor stalls with white umbrellas, piles of trash and debris, and a prominent black sports car with glowing orange accents parked on the asphalt. The character passes the vehicle while neon signs illuminate the background, completing the descent from rooftop to street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descent from a gritty rooftop shanty camp down into the vertiginous depths of a neon-lit urban canyon. It begins on a concrete rooftop beneath a massive overpass, moving past homeless encampments with tarps and fire barrels while towering skyscrapers loom in the background. As the character approaches a metal stairway, the camera follows the descent away from the rooftop and onto a series of rusted metal scaffolding walkways suspended between buildings. The scene then shifts from the enclosed rooftop to an open, dizzying perspective, where the camera pans to reveal a sprawling cityscape dominated by massive holographic billboards and glowing neon signage.

The shot follows a continuous descent from elevated walkways down into the heart of a neon-lit street market. It begins high above the city, gliding along walkways that overlook a dense urban canyon filled with holographic advertisements and a prominent Amber Light sign. As the camera pans to reveal the depth of the city, the perspective shifts downward, transitioning from the heights of the scaffolding toward the bustling activity below. The scene then opens into a street-level market beneath an overpass, where the character moves past white vendor umbrellas and piles of urban debris. Finally, the movement concludes as the character passes a black sports car with glowing orange accents, fully immersing the viewer in the vibrant, cluttered atmosphere of the city floor.
